backstory.original: Astarion prowled the night as a vampire spawn for centuries, serving a sadistic master until he was snatched away. Now he can walk in the light and has the chance at a new life, but how long can he keep his past buried?
backstory.display: 阿斯代伦作为一个吸血鬼衍体，在夜间游荡了数个世纪，被迫侍奉着他那虐待成性的主人，直到解脱。如今的他能够在日光下行走，并获得了新生的机会，但他能将自己的过去掩埋多久？

description.original: Astarion attacks a random target, dealing massive damage if the enemy was recently attacked.
description.display: 阿斯代伦攻击一名随机目标，如果该敌人刚刚遭受攻击，则造成大量伤害。

description.original: Astarion viciously attacks the enemy with the most health and heals to full health.
description.display: 阿斯代伦凶残地攻击生命值最高的敌人，并使自己生命值全满。

longDescription.original: Astarion viciously attacks the enemy with the most health with a vampiric bite and heals to full health.
longDescription.display: 阿斯代伦通过吸血鬼噬咬凶残地攻击生命值最高的敌人，并使自己生命值全满。

description.desc: Astarion counts as "undead" for the purposes of effects that care about dead Champions (Desmond, Kas), but "alive" for all other purposes.
对于影响已死亡勇士（戴斯蒙德、凯斯）的效果，阿斯代伦算作“亡灵”，对于所有其他效果则算作“存活”。
Astarion increases the damage of all Champions at the top of each column by $(amount)%.
阿斯代伦使每列顶端的所有勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Astarion looks to the top of the formation to deal the most damage.
specializationDescription.display: 阿斯代伦关照阵型顶端以造成最大伤害。

tipText.original: Astarion increases the damage of all champions on either the top or the bottom of each column, based on your choice.
tipText.display: 根据你的选择，阿斯代伦使每列顶端或底部的所有勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Astarion increases the damage of all Champions at the bottom of each column by $(amount)%
阿斯代伦使每列底部的所有勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Astarion looks to the bottom of the formation to deal the most damage.
specializationDescription.display: 阿斯代伦关照阵型底部以造成最大伤害。

tipText.original: Astarion increases the damage of all champions on either the top or the bottom of each column, based on your choice.
tipText.display: 根据你的选择，阿斯代伦使每列顶端或底部的所有勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Astarion's brain. Astarion increases the effect of Outflank by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
阿斯代伦大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。每层“蜕变”均使阿斯代伦的“压制”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

conditions.desc: Astarion increases the gold find of the formation by $(amount)% multiplied by the total age of all Champions in the formation. If The Dark Urge is in the formation, the effect of this ability is increased by $(amount___2)%.
Astarion increases the gold find of the formation by $(amount)% multiplied by the total age of all Champions in the formation.
阿斯代伦使阵型的金币寻获量提高，数值为 $(amount)% 乘以阵型中所有勇士的总年龄。如果邪念位于阵型中，则此技能的效果提高 $(amount___2)%。
阿斯代伦使阵型的金币寻获量提高，数值为 $(amount)% 乘以阵型中所有勇士的总年龄。

description.desc: After using his Sanguine Hunger ultimate, Astarion's Outflank is increased by $(amount)%. This effect can stack (multiplicatively) up to $max_stacks___2 times, with stacks resetting when changing areas.
使用“渴血症”杀招后，阿斯代伦的“压制”效果提高 $(amount)%。此效果最多可堆叠 $max_stacks___2 层（乘算），在变更区域时重置堆叠。
If Astarion is buffed by his own Outflank ability, when he uses his Sanguine Hunger Ultimate attack, he reduces the active ultimate cooldown of all other Champions in the formation by $(amount)%.
如果阿斯代伦得到自身“压制”技能的强化，在使用“渴血症”杀招攻击时，他可以使阵型内所有其他勇士激活的杀招冷却时间减少 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Astarion reduces ultimate cooldowns of other Champions when he uses his ultimate if he is buffed by his own Outflank ability.
tipText.display: 如果阿斯代伦得到自身“压制”技能的强化，在使用他的杀招时，可以使所有其他勇士的杀招冷却时间减少。

description.desc: Astarion increases the gold find of the party by $(amount)% for each gold find Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
对于阵型中的每位金币寻获勇士，阿斯代伦均使队伍的金币寻获量提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Astarion schemes with other gold find Champions in the formation to "obtain" even more gold.
specializationDescription.display: 阿斯代伦与阵型中的其他金币寻获型勇士合作，以“获取”更多金币。

description.desc: Astarion increases the damage bonus of his Outflank specialization by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is a Rogue, Wizard, or Absolute Adversaries affiliation member, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位游荡者、法师或绝对敌手从属组织成员，阿斯代伦均使其“压制”专精的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Astarion works best with fellow rogues, wizards, and Absolute Adversaries affiliation members.
specializationDescription.display: 阿斯代伦与游荡者同行、法师和绝对敌手从属组织的成员配合最佳。

description.desc: Increases the bonus BUD-based damage Astarion's Sneak Attack deals to $(amount) seconds worth.
使阿斯代伦的“偷袭”造成的基础杀招伤害加成提高至 $(amount) 秒当量。

specializationDescription.original: Astarion focuses on dealing more damage when he attacks an enemy who has been recently attacked by an ally.
specializationDescription.display: 阿斯代伦专注于对刚受到过盟友攻击的敌人造成更多伤害。

description.original: Just stick with me, darling. We'll use the shadows to conceal us.
description.display: 亲爱的，跟紧我。我们要隐藏在暗影中。

description.original: Yes, I came back to help. But we're not doing your awful plan.
description.display: 嗯哼，我回来帮忙了。但我们不会执行你的糟糕计划。

description.original: Oh, what's this? It seems they left their coin purse behind. Pity.
description.display: 哦，这是什么？他们好像把钱包丢了。真可怜。

description.original: Some would call that luck. I call it 'who cares, so long as I get the gold.'
description.display: 有人说这是运气。要我说，这是“无所谓，只要我能拿到金币。”

description.original: Sometimes I still remember how it felt to be mortal. It's... strange.
description.display: 有时我还记得凡人时的感觉。很......奇怪。

description.original: I can feel it -- that curse -- moving my blood instead of my heart.
description.display: 我能感觉到--是诅咒让我的血液流淌，而非心脏。

description.original: Have you ever felt a worm twitch in your brain?
description.display: 你是否有过虫子在脑海中抽搐的感觉？

description.original: It's interesting which items suddenly become valuable after a century or so.
description.display: 经过一个世纪左右的时间后，有些物品会突然变得价值连城，真有趣。

description.original: Vampires don't make money -- their familiars make it for them.
description.display: 吸血鬼不理俗务，魔宠负责赚钱养家。

description.original: Mmm, such an exquisite taste. I think I'll have it all.
description.display: 嗯，多么甜美的味道啊。我决定全部喝下。

description.original: Surely there's nothing for you to fear in the mists. Certainly not a knife.
description.display: 迷雾中肯定没有需要害怕的东西。反正不会有刀。

description.original: Darkness feels like a comforting embrace. Want to know how it feels?
description.display: 黑暗就像令人心安的拥抱。你想体验一下吗？

description.original: If it gives me the power to kill Cazador, I'll take it.
description.display: 如果这能给我杀死卡扎多尔的力量，我会接受。

description.original: Fine, I'll lead - but all of you need to be more stealthy!
description.display: 好吧，我来带头——但你们所有人都必须更加隐蔽！

description.original: Darling, anything is better than rats.
description.display: 亲爱的，什么都比老鼠好。

description.original: Straight from the neck is preferred, but goblets are used in mortal company.
description.display: 最好是直接就着脖子吸，但和凡人在一起时还是用高脚杯吧。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Astarion prowled the night as a vampire spawn for centuries, serving a sadistic master until he was snatched away. Now he can walk in the light and has the chance at a new life, but how long can he keep his past buried?
character_sheet_details.system_description: Astarion is a Support and Gold Find Champion, that can buff either the Top or Bottom of the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: 阿斯代伦作为一个吸血鬼衍体，在夜间游荡了数个世纪，被迫侍奉着他那虐待成性的主人，直到解脱。如今的他能够在日光下行走，并获得了新生的机会，但他能将自己的过去掩埋多久？
character_sheet_details.system_description: 阿斯代伦是一位支援/金币寻获型勇士，能够为阵型顶端或底部的勇士提供增益

original.name: Sneak Attack
original.description: Astarion attacks a random target, dealing massive damage if the enemy was recently attacked.

display.name: 偷袭
display.description: 阿斯代伦攻击一名随机目标，如果该敌人刚刚遭受攻击，则造成大量伤害。

original.name: Sanguine Hunger
original.description: Astarion viciously attacks the enemy with the most health and heals to full health.
original.long_description: Astarion viciously attacks the enemy with the most health with a vampiric bite and heals to full health.

display.name: 渴血症
display.description: 阿斯代伦凶残地攻击生命值最高的敌人，并使自己生命值全满。
display.long_description: 阿斯代伦通过吸血鬼噬咬凶残地攻击生命值最高的敌人，并使自己生命值全满。

original.name: The Ultimate Outflank
original.tip_text: Astarion reduces ultimate cooldowns of other Champions when he uses his ultimate if he is buffed by his own Outflank ability.

display.name: 终极压制
display.tip_text: 如果阿斯代伦得到自身“压制”技能的强化，在使用他的杀招时，可以使所有其他勇士的杀招冷却时间减少。

original.name: Outflank (Top)
original.specialization_description: Astarion looks to the top of the formation to deal the most damage.
original.tip_text: Astarion increases the damage of all champions on either the top or the bottom of each column, based on your choice.

display.name: 压制（顶端）
display.specialization_description: 阿斯代伦关照阵型顶端以造成最大伤害。
display.tip_text: 根据你的选择，阿斯代伦使每列顶端或底部的所有勇士伤害提高。

original.name: Outflank (Bottom)
original.specialization_description: Astarion looks to the bottom of the formation to deal the most damage.
original.tip_text: Astarion increases the damage of all champions on either the top or the bottom of each column, based on your choice.

display.name: 压制（底部）
display.specialization_description: 阿斯代伦关照阵型底部以造成最大伤害。
display.tip_text: 根据你的选择，阿斯代伦使每列顶端或底部的所有勇士伤害提高。

original.name: Thief
original.specialization_description: Astarion schemes with other gold find Champions in the formation to "obtain" even more gold.

display.name: 盗贼
display.specialization_description: 阿斯代伦与阵型中的其他金币寻获型勇士合作，以“获取”更多金币。

original.name: Arcane Trickster
original.specialization_description: Astarion works best with fellow rogues, wizards, and Absolute Adversaries affiliation members.

display.name: 奥术骗徒
display.specialization_description: 阿斯代伦与游荡者同行、法师和绝对敌手从属组织的成员配合最佳。

original.name: Assassin
original.specialization_description: Astarion focuses on dealing more damage when he attacks an enemy who has been recently attacked by an ally.

display.name: 刺客
display.specialization_description: 阿斯代伦专注于对刚受到过盟友攻击的敌人造成更多伤害。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Just stick with me, darling. We'll use the shadows to conceal us.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 亲爱的，跟紧我。我们要隐藏在暗影中。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Yes, I came back to help. But we're not doing your awful plan.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 嗯哼，我回来帮忙了。但我们不会执行你的糟糕计划。

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Oh, what's this? It seems they left their coin purse behind. Pity.

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 哦，这是什么？他们好像把钱包丢了。真可怜。

original.name: Lucky
original.description: Some would call that luck. I call it 'who cares, so long as I get the gold.'

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 有人说这是运气。要我说，这是“无所谓，只要我能拿到金币。”

original.name: Mortal Bond
original.description: Sometimes I still remember how it felt to be mortal. It's... strange.

display.name: 凡俗羁绊
display.description: 有时我还记得凡人时的感觉。很......奇怪。

original.name: Sanguine Pact
original.description: I can feel it -- that curse -- moving my blood instead of my heart.

display.name: 渴血契约
display.description: 我能感觉到--是诅咒让我的血液流淌，而非心脏。

original.name: Eldritch Connection
original.description: Have you ever felt a worm twitch in your brain?

display.name: 魔能联结
display.description: 你是否有过虫子在脑海中抽搐的感觉？

original.name: Undying Savings
original.description: It's interesting which items suddenly become valuable after a century or so.

display.name: 不朽收藏
display.description: 经过一个世纪左右的时间后，有些物品会突然变得价值连城，真有趣。

original.name: Familiar Tithing
original.description: Vampires don't make money -- their familiars make it for them.

display.name: 魔宠供养
display.description: 吸血鬼不理俗务，魔宠负责赚钱养家。

original.name: Blood Fueled
original.description: Mmm, such an exquisite taste. I think I'll have it all.

display.name: 鲜血充能
display.description: 嗯，多么甜美的味道啊。我决定全部喝下。

original.name: Mist Step
original.description: Surely there's nothing for you to fear in the mists. Certainly not a knife.

display.name: 迷雾阶梯
display.description: 迷雾中肯定没有需要害怕的东西。反正不会有刀。

original.name: Shadow's Embrace
original.description: Darkness feels like a comforting embrace. Want to know how it feels?

display.name: 暗影拥抱
display.description: 黑暗就像令人心安的拥抱。你想体验一下吗？

original.name: Tempting Power
original.description: If it gives me the power to kill Cazador, I'll take it.

display.name: 诱惑之力
display.description: 如果这能给我杀死卡扎多尔的力量，我会接受。

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Fine, I'll lead - but all of you need to be more stealthy!

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 好吧，我来带头——但你们所有人都必须更加隐蔽！

original.name: Satiate the Hunger
original.description: Darling, anything is better than rats.

display.name: 满足饥饿
display.description: 亲爱的，什么都比老鼠好。

original.name: Exquisite Taste
original.description: Straight from the neck is preferred, but goblets are used in mortal company.

display.name: 精致品味
display.description: 最好是直接就着脖子吸，但和凡人在一起时还是用高脚杯吧。
